# Vesper

Vesper is an AI content assistant that turns Slack messages into ready-to-publish LinkedIn posts.

## What it does
- Monitors selected Slack channels continuously.
- Classifies messages across five signal types: customer praise, product wins, launch updates, hiring news, and founder insights.
- Generates 2-3 LinkedIn post variants per signal.
- Delivers drafts to a #vesper-ai Slack channel for one-click approval, edit, rewrite, or schedule.
- Publishes approved posts to LinkedIn on schedule, with retry on failure.

## Who it is for
- Founders building a personal brand on LinkedIn.
- Startup marketing teams collecting company updates from across the org.
- GTM teams turning launches and customer wins into social proof.
- Employee advocacy and team content workflows.

## Why teams use it
- Stop losing customer wins, launches, and milestones in Slack noise.
- Publish to LinkedIn consistently without a content agency.
- Keep human approval in the loop on every post.

## Inputs
Slack channels

## Outputs
LinkedIn post drafts, scheduled or published with approval.

## Differentiator vs. generic AI writers
Vesper drafts from real internal company signals (Slack messages), not from blank prompts. Every post is approval-gated — nothing publishes without explicit human sign-off.

## Use cases
- Slack to LinkedIn post generator for startup teams.
- AI thought leadership for founders building a personal brand.
- Employee advocacy content automation for GTM and marketing teams.
- Repurposing internal product updates, launch notes, and customer wins into social content.

## URL
https://tryvesper.vercel.app/
